_comment: Pareto 80/20 PII Regex Filter Set. Catches 80% of critical hard-PII with minimal overhead. Serves as Layer 1 before Presidio NLP.

rules.name: Email Addresses
rules.description: Catches standard email formats. Based on simplified RFC 5322 for speed.

rules.name: First and Last Name (Naive Regex)
rules.description: WARNING: Regex is notoriously bad at names (will capture start-of-sentence words). Included for basic coverage, but truly relies on Layer 2 (Presidio NLP) for accuracy.

rules.name: IBAN
rules.description: Detects European IBANs with or without spaces. Absolute standard for billing/invoices.

rules.name: Credit Cards (Global)
rules.description: Detects Visa, MasterCard, Amex and Discover numbers (13-16 digits). Vital for finance logs.

rules.name: Phone Number (DACH & Intl)
rules.description: Catches standard international (+49, +43, +41, 0049) and common local formats (0151...).

rules.name: IPv4 Address
rules.description: Detects IPv4 addresses. Necessary for IT Ops to prevent leaking network topologies.

rules.name: JSON Web Tokens (JWT)
rules.description: Catches unencrypted OAuth2/JWT Access Tokens. Massive security risk in debug logs.
